hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */services/gateway/src/*) cd /home/user/vitana-platform/services/gateway && ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | head -5); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "$ERRORS" >&2; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"TypeScript build errors found — deploy will fail. Fix before committing."}'; exit 1; fi ;; esac; }
